'''âs-z-v''' ('''kasazav''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quickle|quickle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-z-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quickle|quickle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âs-z-v
|-
! Lemma
| kasazav
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisazav|thisazav]] || [[word:jisazav|jisazav]] || [[word:shisazav|shisazav]] || [[word:kisazav|kisazav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusazav|thuthusazav]] || [[word:jujusazav|jujusazav]] || [[word:shushusazav|shushusazav]] || [[word:kukusazav|kukusazav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thusazav|thusazav]] || [[word:jusazav|jusazav]] || [[word:shusazav|shusazav]] || [[word:kusazav|kusazav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thusazav|thusazav]] || [[word:jusazav|jusazav]] || [[word:shusazav|shusazav]] || [[word:kusazav|kusazav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thesazav|thesazav]] || [[word:jesazav|jesazav]] || [[word:shesazav|shesazav]] || [[word:kesazav|kesazav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothosazav|thothosazav]] || [[word:jojosazav|jojosazav]] || [[word:shoshosazav|shoshosazav]] || [[word:kokosazav|kokosazav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thosazav|thosazav]] || [[word:josazav|josazav]] || [[word:shosazav|shosazav]] || [[word:kosazav|kosazav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosazav|thosazav]] || [[word:josazav|josazav]] || [[word:shosazav|shosazav]] || [[word:kosazav|kosazav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠsazav|thĂŠsazav]] || [[word:jĂŠsazav|jĂŠsazav]] || [[word:shĂŠsazav|shĂŠsazav]] || [[word:kĂŠsazav|kĂŠsazav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathasazav|thathasazav]] || [[word:jajasazav|jajasazav]] || [[word:shashasazav|shashasazav]] || [[word:kakasazav|kakasazav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasazav|thasazav]] || [[word:jasazav|jasazav]] || [[word:shasazav|shasazav]] || [[word:kasazav|kasazav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasazav|thasazav]] || [[word:jasazav|jasazav]] || [[word:shasazav|shasazav]] || [[word:kasazav|kasazav]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shasazav|shasazav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshasazav|goshasazav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishasazav|gokishasazav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shasazavnĂŒ|shasazavnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshasazavnknĂŒ|goshasazavnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishasazavnĂŒ|gokishasazavnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shasazavshĂ«|shasazavshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshasazavnkshĂ«|goshasazavnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishasazavshĂ«|gokishasazavshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasazavro|shasazavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasazavnkro|goshasazavnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasazavro|gokishasazavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shasazavmu|shasazavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasazavnkmu|goshasazavnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasazavmu|gokishasazavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shasazavsher|shasazavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshasazavnksher|goshasazavnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishasazavsher|gokishasazavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shasazavng|shasazavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshasazavnkng|goshasazavnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishasazavng|gokishasazavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shasazavya|shasazavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshasazavnkya|goshasazavnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishasazavya|gokishasazavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shasazavyam|shasazavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshasazavnkyam|goshasazavnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishasazavyam|gokishasazavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasazavnĂŒshĂ«|shasazavnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasazavnknĂŒshĂ«|goshasazavnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasazavnĂŒshĂ«|gokishasazavnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasazavnĂŒro|shasazavnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasazavnknĂŒro|goshasazavnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasazavnĂŒro|gokishasazavnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasazavnĂŒmu|shasazavnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasazavnknĂŒmu|goshasazavnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasazavnĂŒmu|gokishasazavnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasazavshĂ«nĂŒ|shasazavshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasazavnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshasazavnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasazavshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishasazavshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasazavshĂ«ro|shasazavshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasazavnkshĂ«ro|goshasazavnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasazavshĂ«ro|gokishasazavshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasazavshĂ«mu|shasazavshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasazavnkshĂ«mu|goshasazavnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasazavshĂ«mu|gokishasazavshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasazavronĂŒ|shasazavronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasazavnkronĂŒ|goshasazavnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasazavronĂŒ|gokishasazavronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasazavroshĂ«|shasazavroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasazavnkroshĂ«|goshasazavnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasazavroshĂ«|gokishasazavroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasazavromu|shasazavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasazavnkromu|goshasazavnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasazavromu|gokishasazavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasazavmunĂŒ|shasazavmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasazavnkmunĂŒ|goshasazavnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasazavmunĂŒ|gokishasazavmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasazavmushĂ«|shasazavmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasazavnkmushĂ«|goshasazavnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasazavmushĂ«|gokishasazavmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasazavmuro|shasazavmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasazavnkmuro|goshasazavnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasazavmuro|gokishasazavmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
